title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Mahindra Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Mahindra Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!
